signals: Google DeepMind lanza Gemini for Science para acelerar descubrimientos en biología y genética mediante agentes de IA.
OpenAI demuestra capacidad de razonamiento avanzado resolviendo un problema matemático abierto desde 1946.
La industria de semiconductores presiona para eliminar errores de diseño (re-spins) mediante IA de verificación avanzada.
Google proyecta una 'era de agentes' multimodales con Gemini Omni y Gemini 3.5 centrados en utilidad práctica.
Singapur y Google sellan una alianza estratégica para aplicar IA de frontera en salud, educación y sostenibilidad.
risks: Dependencia excesiva de LLMs genéricos en documentación de ingeniería crítica donde la precisión es vital.
Impacto financiero devastador de errores en el diseño de hardware que no pueden ser parcheados vía software.
Riesgos de seguridad en la superficie de hardware ante ataques cada vez más sofisticados potenciados por IA.
watch: Despliegue comercial de los modelos Gemini Nano y Gemini Omni en entornos de desarrollo real.
Evolución de la plataforma de APIs de xAI tras su apertura pública a desarrolladores.
Resultados de las investigaciones de Co-Scientist en tratamientos para la ELA y rejuvenecimiento celular.

items.title: Today, we share a breakthrough on the planar unit distance problem, a famous open question first posed by Paul Erdős in 1946. For nearly 80 years, mathematic...
items.summary: Today, we share a breakthrough on the planar unit distance problem, a famous open question first posed by Paul Erdős in 1946. For nearly 80 years, mathematicians believed the best possible solutions looked roughly like square grids. An OpenAI model has now disproved that

items.raw_summary: Today, we share a breakthrough on the planar unit distance problem, a famous open question first posed by Paul Erdős in 1946. For nearly 80 years, mathematicians believed the best possible solutions looked roughly like square grids. An OpenAI model has now disproved that
items.why: Hito en razonamiento matemático al resolver un problema de 80 años, demostrando capacidades de descubrimiento real.
items.title_es: Breakthrough en el problema de la distancia unitaria planar, una cuestión abierta desde 1946

items.title: We want to help scientists discover their next breakthrough with AI. Gemini for Science is our new suite of experimental tools to help them explore more hypo...
items.summary: We want to help scientists discover their next breakthrough with AI. Gemini for Science is our new suite of experimental tools to help them explore more hypotheses, validate work at scale, unpack literature with ease, and more 🧵 The media could not be played. Nano Banana 2 and Nano Banana Pro are now generally available. 🍌 Our best generation models are now available to developers and businesses in and via the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform API. Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini 🚀 Today, we’re sharing the white paper for GE 2, our first native multimodal embedding model. Whether it’s text, audio, video, or , GE 2 provides a unified representation of the input.
items.raw_title: We want to help scientists discover their next breakthrough with AI. Gemini for Science is our new suite of experimental tools to help them explore more hypo...
items.raw_summary: We want to help scientists discover their next breakthrough with AI. Gemini for Science is our new suite of experimental tools to help them explore more hypotheses, validate work at scale, unpack literature with ease, and more ![Image 3: 🧵](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9f5.svg) The media could not be played. Nano Banana 2 and Nano Banana Pro are now generally available. ![Image 5: 🍌](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f34c.svg) Our best image generation models are now available to developers and businesses in and via the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform API. Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini ![Image 7: 🚀](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f680.svg) Today, we’re sharing the white paper for GE 2, our first native multimodal embedding model. Whether it’s text, audio, video, or image, GE 2 provides a unified representation of the input.
items.why: Google lanza herramientas multimodales nativas y modelos específicos para investigación científica avanzada.
items.title_es: Gemini for Science: nueva suite de herramientas experimentales para descubrimientos científicos

items.title: Caspia’s AI Makes You a Security Verification Expert
items.summary: Let’s face it, powerful, highly trained AI is making it easier to find security flaws in many systems. When the attack surface becomes the underlying hardware, the risks grow exponentially. Unlike software, hardware can’t easily be “patched”. Early, advanced security verification is the way to mitigate these risks, but doing&8230; Read More The post Caspia&8217;s AI Makes You a Security Verification Expert appeared first on SemiWiki .

items.title: Re-Spins Get You Fired, Says Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan
items.summary: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan’s statement that “re-spins get you fired” reflects the enormous pressure facing semiconductor companies as chip complexity, manufacturing costs, and competitive demands continue to rise. In the semiconductor industry, a “re-spin” occurs when a chip design must be revised and manufactured again because&8230; Read More The post Re-Spins Get You Fired, Says Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan appeared first on SemiWiki .

items.title: Why Generic LLMs Fall Short for Critical Engineering Documentation
items.summary: Engineering documentation has always been difficult to produce, maintain, and scale. But with the rise of generative AI, many organizations are asking a reasonable question: can a general-purpose large language model (LLM) like Claude automate the work?
